name: systems-thinking-toolkit
description: Systems-thinking toolkit (Sherwood 2002) — CLDs, archetypes, simulation, and more across 7 skills.

interface.shortDescription: Map feedback loops, archetypes, and leverage points
interface.longDescription: Reason about complex systems using Sherwood's (2002) toolkit: craft causal-loop diagrams, recognize the classic system archetypes, overlay loops to find structure, model behavior with simulation, and trace strategy levers through their cascading effects — plus team mental-model and manager-personality framing. Use it to understand why a stubborn problem persists, spot unintended consequences, and find where a small change moves the whole system.
defaultPrompt: Build a causal-loop diagram for why our onboarding keeps stalling.
Which system archetype explains this recurring problem?
Find the highest-leverage intervention point in this system.
